name: default
description: Goon's all-purpose engineering pipeline. triage → confirm_repo (gate) → approve_plan (gate) → execute → test → verify → update_memory → open_pr → notify. The two gates pause the workflow for your approval. Set auto_approve=true (or env GOON_AUTO_APPROVE=1) for unattended runs.
pr_body_template:
Resolves {{.Key}}.

## Plan
{{range .Plan}}- {{if .Done}}✓{{else}}✗{{end}} {{.Title}}
{{end}}

Branch: `{{.Branch}}`
Project: `{{.Project}}`

— opened autonomously by goon 🤖

on_failure: echo 'workflow failed for {{.Key}} — see goon logs --tail=50' >&2
